title: Fair Recipes
description: Changes and adds recipes in order to make crafting Building Blocks less painful.
body:
# Fair Recipes by the People for the People! 
###  Bringing (some) justice into Minecraft Crafting Recipes
A Datapack/Mod containing a few recipe changes and additions (212 json files) that we're generated through an automated process. They are designed to make Crafting Building Blocks more convenient and fair.

Complete and unlockable through advancements like Vanilla Recipes.


<details>
<summary>Building Blocks Recipes</summary>
*Following recipes applies to every blocks where applicable.*
  
![stairs recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Z2lwoVTf/images/d3b49ddff0916d39d1949b527ec81df54830d00c.png)
![stair reverse recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Z2lwoVTf/images/a1f8102188c41c6b54d9ac8f1a602ffefe5c8010.png)
![reverse slab recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Z2lwoVTf/images/baa0f31dbb09b58c2a2c9ccf9bb9b9a29eb84e40.png)
![trapdoor recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Z2lwoVTf/images/cc64dffc7b6b79934eec060b234046b65796a3a1.png)
![button recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/Z2lwoVTf/images/9fc4728da5a5b4b8b63169dd9f42bf5e3b2ccd0e.png)
![pressure plate recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d850b6536d1afeade9e4f70aa98fbae35e1c3659.png)
</details>


<details>
<summary>Added Cobblestone Subsitute</summary>
*In these images, Cobbled Deepslate can be replaced with Cobblestone and Blackstone, or, any items tagged with "stone_crafting_materials".*  

![lever recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f83736036e88aed8bfc71983e3ff329ac9a8b6d8.png)
![piston recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e56721d98ebcf5bb6f7551c9ec779c888697cbb.png)
![observer recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d5bc3520ec4b42357dcae6db062c6605871cd8b7.png)
![dispenser recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65f6b59e71a8b7ee8cf1490f1fc84bad149fe782.png)
![dropper recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fb52e28471cb8ac7cc97c0d94259ae09f127e691.png)
</details>
